ddls:
CREATE TABLE "etfs" (
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ETF */,
  "etf_name" TEXT /* Name of the ETF */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the ETF in the portfolio */,
  "investment_focus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment focus */,
  "holdings" INTEGER /* Number of holdings in the ETF */,
  "ter" TEXT /* Total Expense Ratio (TER) of the ETF */,
  "fund_size" INTEGER /* Fund size of the ETF in million EUR */,
  "return_1y" TEXT /* 1-year return of the ETF */,
  "return_3y" TEXT /* 3-year return of the ETF */,
  "return_5y" TEXT /* 5-year return of the ETF */,
  "esg_score" TEXT /* ESG score of the ETF */,
  "sustainability_focus" TEXT /* Sustainability focus of the ETF */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the ETF was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("etf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_etfs_investment_focus_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_focus_id") REFERENCES investment_focuses ("focus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_focuses" (
  "focus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment focus */,
  "focus_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment focus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the investment focus */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the investment focus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("focus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF the holding belongs to */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock in the holding */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the stock in the ETF */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holdings_etf_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_id") REFERENCES etfs ("etf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance data */,
  "return" TEXT /* Return of the ETF for the year */,
  "standard_deviation" TEXT /* Standard deviation of the ETF's returns for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_etf_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_id") REFERENCES etfs ("etf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "portfolio_size" INTEGER /* Size of the client's portfolio in million EUR */,
  "investment_objectives" TEXT /* Investment objectives of the client */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Risk tolerance of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client managing the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "rebalancing_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of rebalancing the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_etfs" (
  "portfolio_etf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio ETF */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the ETF in the portfolio */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date when the ETF was added to the portfolio */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date when the ETF was removed from the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_etf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_etfs_etf_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_id") REFERENCES etfs ("etf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_etfs_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_models" (
  "risk_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "etf_risk_assessments" (
  "etf_risk_assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ETF risk assessment */,
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF */,
  "risk_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk model */,
  "risk_score" TEXT /* Risk score of the ETF */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("etf_risk_assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_etf_risk_assessments_etf_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_id") REFERENCES etfs ("etf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_etf_risk_assessments_risk_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("risk_model_id") REFERENCES risk_models ("risk_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "esg_metrics" (
  "esg_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ESG metric */,
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the ESG metric */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the ESG metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("esg_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_esg_metrics_etf_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_id") REFERENCES etfs ("etf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sustainability_focuses" (
  "sustainability_focus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sustainability focus */,
  "sustainability_focus_name" TEXT /* Name of the sustainability focus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sustainability focus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sustainability_focus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "etf_sustainability" (
  "etf_sustainability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ETF sustainability */,
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF */,
  "sustainability_focus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sustainability focus */,
  "sustainability_score" TEXT /* Sustainability score of the ETF */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("etf_sustainability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_etf_sustainability_sustainability_focus_id FOREIGN KEY ("sustainability_focus_id") REFERENCES sustainability_focuses ("sustainability_focus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_etf_sustainability_etf_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_id") REFERENCES etfs ("etf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "etf_performance_metrics" (
  "etf_performance_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ETF performance metric */,
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("etf_performance_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_etf_performance_metrics_etf_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_id") REFERENCES etfs ("etf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_performance" (
  "portfolio_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio performance */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance */,
  "return" TEXT /* Return of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_performance_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)
